## CryptoUtils.KeyStore.getSecretProvider() method

Creates a SecretProvider function for use with IEncryptionConfig. The returned function looks up secrets from this key store.

**Signature:**

```typescript
getSecretProvider(): Result<SecretProvider>;
```
**Returns:**

Result&lt;SecretProvider&gt;

Success with SecretProvider, Failure if locked
